info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Oracle Fusion CX Sales and Fusion Service REST API
Accounts
Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications List accounts

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 25, max 500)

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

params.name: q
params.description: Filter expression using Oracle REST query syntax

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Fields to sort by with optional :asc or :desc direction

params.name: finder
params.description: Named finder in format FinderName;param1=value1

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of child resources to expand

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of customer and prospect account records including organization details, addresses, contacts, and sales team members.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Create an account

items.docs: Create a new customer or prospect account record.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Get an account

params.name: PartyNumber
params.description: Party number identifying the account

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

params.name: expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of child resources to expand

items.docs: Retrieve a specific account by party number.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Update an account

items.docs: Update an existing account record.

info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Delete an account
